data.name: Cuckold Sex - Episode 4
data.detailed_description:
An erotic VISUAL NOVEL featuring HD graphics, steamy ANIMATIONS, and realistic-looking characters.
James dares Lily to seduce Melissa at the spa, but she takes things further by surrendering to a hot stranger’s advances in the sauna.
Will James welcome his wife’s boldness?

GAME DESCRIPTION

Join Lily and James on their quest to spice up their marriage.

EPISODE 4

When James dares Lily to prove she can seduce her friend Melissa at the spa, he has no idea what he's setting in motion.
His wife is more than capable of playing with fire, and she eagerly rises to the challenge, determined to make him eat his words.
But as the night unfolds, Lily’s boldness leads her into unexpected territory. A chance encounter with a mysterious stranger in the sauna tempts her to explore this fantasy without her husband’s explicit consent, pushing the boundaries of her marriage.

Will Lily give in to her desires?
Will James welcome his wife’s boldness?

Follow the story to find out.

FEATURES

- HD renders and animations
- Video and image gallery

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
